headline: Segro rebuffs enhanced $18.2B Prologis takeover bid
summary: Logistics real estate operator Prologis said Monday that its enhanced third pass at London-based peer Segro was rejected. The post Segro rebuffs enhanced $18.2B Prologis takeover bid appeared first on FreightWaves.

headline: Segro rebuffs third approach from US bidder worth £13.5bn
summary: Prologis said it put forward a new cash-and-stock proposal to buy FTSE 100 firm Segro on July 16 worth £9.93 a share.
